title: Weihai, Shandong — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Weihai, Shandong: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Weihai is a city in Shandong with a population of 2,906,000. A clean coastal city on the Shandong Peninsula, known for its excellent air quality, beaches, and as a retirement destination.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
